The combination of wide, open landscapes and the specific type of agricultural terrain is more typical of central Spain than the more lush landscapes of France or the coastal-influenced terrain of Portugal.

The overall road geometry and guardrail style are highly consistent with Spanish infrastructure.
The infrastructure is compatible with Portuguese standards as they share similar European conventions and right-hand traffic. However, the specific chevron sign style is more typical of Spain.
